author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase G.2 real-artifact harness. (1) Survey ferrotorch-tokenize public surface — done: load_tokenizer(path), encode/decode (with add_special_tokens/skip_special_tokens), encode_batch, apply_chat_template (minijinja), apply_chat_template_to_ids, load_chat_template, vocab_size/token_to_id/id_to_token. (2) Pin script: download tokenizer.json + tokenizer_config.json (+ chat template) from 5 HF tokenizer families (Llama 3 via unsloth/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct mirror to avoid gated walls, openai/clip-vit-large-patch14, bert-base-uncased, gpt2, HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM-135M). Run Python transformers.AutoTokenizer over ~20 fixed test strings; save per-family JSON: strings, encode_with_special, encode_no_special, decode_with_special_keep, decode_with_special_skip, decode_no_special, plus chat-template render for system+user+assistant conv (add_generation_prompt false and true). Bundle to bundle.tar, upload to ferrotorch/tokenizer-parity-v1. (3) Rust dump: ferrotorch-tokenize/examples/tokenizer_parity_dump.rs — args --family --fixture-dir --output-dir. (4) Verify harness: scripts/verify_tokenizer_inference.py — exact integer/string match per family. (5) Cargo test wrapper: ferrotorch-tokenize/tests/conformance_hf_parity.rs #[ignore]-gated, downloads bundle via hf_hub_download and runs in-process. (6) Pin SHA in ferrotorch-hub/src/registry.rs as tokenizer-parity-v1. No tolerance: exact == on all ids and strings.
